description_long: This is a modern, soft-sided duffel-style briefcase with a sleek, matte black exterior. It features two flexible handles on top, one longer for shoulder carrying and one shorter for hand carrying, both made of the same material as the body. The front side displays a geometric logo and the word 'SIMPLA' in light blue, adding a touch of branding. The main compartment is accessed via a zipper that runs along the top, and there are two flap-like extensions at the base, likely for additional storage or expansion. The left side has a zippered opening, while the right side is rounded and smooth, with no visible pockets. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic fabric and possibly some internal structural support for shape retention.
description: A sleek, matte black duffel-style briefcase with dual handles, a front logo, and zippered compartments, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a rounded end with a zippered opening and a glimpse of the top handles.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the 'SIMPLA' logo, dual handles, and two flap-like extensions at the base.
description_view_2: The right side view reveals a smooth, rounded end with no visible pockets or openings.
description_view_3: The back view displays a clean, uninterrupted surface with a zipper running along the top edge.
attribute_handle_type: Two flexible, looped handles made of synthetic fabric; one long for shoulder carrying and one short for hand carrying, both stitched to the top of the briefcase.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top and side; no visible lock mechanism.
attribute_brand_logo: A geometric logo and the word 'SIMPLA' in light blue are visible on the front center of the briefcase.
attribute_external_pockets: Two flap-like extensions at the base of the front, likely serving as external compartments with zipper closures; one zippered opening on the left side.
